summary: Audited M2 capture, NVENC/unsafe boundaries, and downstream sample expectations with three independent subreports. No P0/P1 findings were found. Non-blocking P2/P3 follow-ups were dispositioned, and a stale m2-capture-one-frame blocker file was marked superseded by the current successful GBM/native DMA-BUF capture evidence.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: P0/P1 findings are resolved or dispositioned
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: All three subreports record no P0/P1 findings. Non-blocking P2/P3 items are summarized in evidence/m2-audit/notes.md.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Downstream sample artifact expectations are documented
qd audit pass reports are recorded

qd sync --from roadmap/qd-export.json && qd sync --from roadmap/qd-export.json --expect-clean
parallel subagent audit of capture evidence, NVENC boundary, and downstream readiness

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node is an evidence audit. Real-world validation evidence is inherited from the audited M2 nodes and reviewed in the subreports.

dagChangesNeeded: Non-blocking follow-up: add encode parameter validation before productizing runtime encode settings.
